events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes open stud bays at floor transitions in a residential job, at rough-complete stage. IRC R302 requires fireblocking at floor/ceiling assemblies and wall/floor intersections to prevent spread of fire. Open stud bays at floor transitions are non-compliant.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
"decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",

  "findings": [
    "Open stud bays at floor transitions lack required fireblocking",
    "Vertical concealed spaces are not interrupted at floor lines, allowing fire/draft spread between levels"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install approved fireblocking at all stud bay/floor transitions using 2x lumber, 3/4 plywood, 1/2 gypsum, or other IRC-approved material",
    "Seal gaps around penetrations with listed firestop material",
    "Re-inspect after fireblocking is installed before closing walls"
  ],
  "rationale": "IRC R302 requires fireblocking in concealed stud spaces at the intersection of vertical and horizontal elements such as floor/ceiling assemblies to prevent spread of fire and gases. Open stud bays at floor transitions are a clear non-compliance at rough-complete stage.",
  "references": ["IRC R302.11", "IRC R302.11.1"]
}
